mano_cua.result_summary: 无法部署。青龙面板是 Docker 化全栈应用，后端启动后 http/grpc worker 循环崩溃（File is not defined），需要 Docker 环境和系统级依赖。裸机 macOS 上无法正常运行。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Qinglong panel requires Docker environment. Backend crashes with 'File is not defined' error in http/grpc workers when running on bare macOS.

deploy_notes: commit d01ec3b310. Cannot deploy on bare macOS - requires Docker.
